name: vault-widgets
description: Embeddable read-only Vault treasury status widgets and parent-page integration. Human checklist: docs/HOST-WIDGET-INTEGRATION.md in the repo.

widgets.label: Full status (iframe)
widgets.notes: Use token= instead of team_lead/project_id when using POST /api/v1/embed-token.

widgets.label: Compact status (iframe)
widgets.notes: Minimal KPI strip for sidebars and footers.

widgets.label: Project JSON API
widgets.notes: Same payload shape the status page consumes; CORS enabled on deployed API.

post_message.parent_origin_format: Percent-encoded origin only, e.g. https%3A%2F%2Fmyapp.com — no path, query, or fragment.
security_notes: Messages are only posted when embed=1 and parent_origin parses to an allowed origin.
The iframe only sends to the exact origin given in parent_origin (never "*").
Payloads mirror public status data; never include wallet keys or API secrets.

events.description: Bridge initialized after load. Parent can show a placeholder until snapshot.
A refresh started (initial load or user/agent refresh).
Load failed; includes a short message string safe for UI.
Treasury snapshot available; includes counts and vault summary fields.
